Upskill turns any package into usable agent knowledge

Modern libraries change too quickly for confident guessing. Agents need live package understanding when the stakes are real.

Where it removes work

  • Less hallucinated API usage
  • Faster adoption of new packages
  • Reusable tool knowledge for future work

What Sysmatic would build

  • Inspect the package, docs, and examples
  • Map capabilities into task-specific procedures
  • Store the result as a reusable skill
